page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.u0.c1m8.large is an x86_64 architecture server instance belonging to the ecs.u0 family. It is configured with 2 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 2 physical Intel Xeon 8163 cores operating at a clock speed of 2.5 GHz. The instance features 16.0 GB of system memory, yielding a high memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per core. It does not include local storage or dedicated GPU hardware, and it operates with a baseline network bandwidth of 1 Gbps under a KVM hypervisor.

Performance benchmarks position this instance in the lower tiers for compute and memory throughput. The single-core stress-ng CPU benchmark scores 1097.18, placing it in the bottom 25%, while the multi-core stress-ng score of 1457.68 falls into the bottom 10%. Memory bandwidth tests show a read-only small block cached rate of 81.39 GB/sec, but uncached large-block read and write speeds drop to 10.06 GB/sec and 9.35 GB/sec respectively, both ranking in the bottom 10%. Similarly, Geekbench and Passmark scores reflect entry-level performance across single-core, multi-core, and database operations.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the ecs.u0.c1m8.large offers a high memory capacity relative to its compute resources, making it a viable option for memory-intensive workloads that do not demand high CPU throughput. However, the tradeoff is limited processing power and lower memory bandwidth. It is best suited for lightweight databases, caching layers like Redis, static web serving, and simple background utility tasks.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.u0.c1m8.large is an entry-level, memory-optimized x86_64 server instance powered by 2 dedicated vCPUs from an Intel Xeon 8163 processor running at 2.5 GHz. It features 16.0 GB of RAM, providing a high 8.0 GB of memory per core, but lacks local storage and GPU acceleration. Baseline network bandwidth is rated at 1 Gbps. Benchmark results place this instance in the lower performance tiers, with stress-ng and Geekbench scores falling in the bottom 10% to 25% range. Large-block memory write bandwidth is limited to 9.35 GB/sec. Given its high memory-to-CPU ratio and modest processing capabilities, this instance is qualitatively cost-effective for memory-heavy, compute-light workloads. It is best suited for lightweight caching layers, small Redis deployments, static web serving, and basic database operations.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.u0.c1m8.large is a memory-optimized server with 2 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 16 GB RAM, and 1 Gbps network speed, designed for lightweight caching and database workloads.
